ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size label (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size equivalent */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "international_size" TEXT /* International size equivalent */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available for the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage if applicable */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Warehouse or store location where the inventory is kept */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provided the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the order status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES customer_addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of each unit of the product */,
  "discounted_price" REAL /* Discounted price if applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the order item was added to the order */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the order item information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the customer information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "size_recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart associated with the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the size recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the recommendation was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in centimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in centimeters */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in centimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the measurement was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_details" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was made */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the shipment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the shipment status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the payment status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the payment method icon for display */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the payment method information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., Billing, Shipping) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code or postal code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the address was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date the address information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
